SEARCH
Package edu.ucsb.cs156.happiercows.jobs

Class CommonsGate

java.lang.Object
edu.ucsb.cs156.happiercows.jobs.CommonsGate
public class CommonsGate extends Object
A shared gate used by every job (scheduled or on demand) that operates on a commons: jobs should only touch games that are in progress (see Commons.gameInProgress(LocalDateTime)). As a side effect, when a commons whose end date has passed is encountered, it is automatically hidden (see issue #250).

  • Constructor Details

    • CommonsGate

      public CommonsGate()

  • Method Details

    • shouldProcess

      public static boolean shouldProcess(Commons commons, CommonsRepository commonsRepository, JobContext ctx)
      Determine whether a job should process the given commons. If the game is not in progress, a skip message is logged; additionally, if the game has ended and the commons is not yet hidden, it is hidden and saved.
      Parameters:
      commons - the commons the job wants to process
      commonsRepository - repository used to save the commons when it is auto-hidden
      ctx - the job context, for logging
      Returns:
      true if the game is in progress and the job should proceed
